Deepfakes have moved from obvious to almost impossible to spot. A video call, voice note, or urgent message may look convincing, but AI can now recreate faces, voices, and mannerisms in seconds. Verification matters more than ever. Stay cautious, trust your instincts, and add a layer of protection to your digital life. Get Webroot now with up to 50% off to help protect your identity from evolving scams 💚 0:00 / 0:05

Deepfakes exploit the very thing finance teams rely on most: trust. One urgent call. One convincing email. One fake vendor request. That’s all it takes to lose millions. 🚨 In our Deepfake Fraud Prevention Guide, we explore how attackers use AI-generated voices, video, and synthetic identities to bypass traditional defences — and how CFOs can build resilience against scams designed to deceive even the most experienced professionals. 📘 0:00 / 0:32
